rationale: The cited 2009 JMR paper is directly about interdependent vs. independent self-view effects in marketplace judgments, and the citing 2024 paper also centers self-construal manipulations (e.g., "I" vs. "We" slogans) and positions itself as adding a mechanism within self-construal research. Given this strong construct/method overlap and an exact DOI match, this is not safely an obvious incidental mention.
